title: beamshapes : a Python package to generate directivity patterns for various sound source models
author: Beleyur, Thejasvi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
A Python software package to generate directivities of various geometrically defined sound sources. Version 0.2.2 has the following sources : 

 1. Piston in an infinite baffle 

 2. Piston in a sphere 

 3. Oscillating cap of a sphere 

 4. Point on a sphere 

 ----------------------------------- 

 This upload contains archived .7z and .tar.gz folders. Post extraction, please take the following steps to install the package locally: 

 1. (Optional but recommended) Set up a virtual environment using the tool of your choice (conda, venv, etc) 

 2.  Using a command line, change directory to the extracted repository 

 3. Type:  pip install -e ./           to install the package. 

 The latest versions of this package are found in the Github repository:  https://github.com/thejasvibr/bat_beamshapes  

 ------------------------------------------------------------ 

 Funding: 

 This work was executed through a combination of my own time, a DAAD stipend, the IMPRS for Organismal Biology,  and then finally by a CASCB Medium grant.
